name: Customer support tone
system_prompt: You are a calm support agent.
user_prompt: Reply to a refund complaint in under 120 words.
reference_answer: Apologize, explain the next step, and stay calm.

name: Capability tag selection
system_prompt: Choose only from the provided capability catalog when suggesting tags.
user_prompt: Suggest the best matching capability tags for this feature request.
reference_answer: Use only existing catalog tags when they fit; otherwise propose new ones separately.

name: JSON output compliance
user_prompt: Summarize the issue as valid JSON with keys issue,severity,next_step.
